message:
feat(E5.F1.T1): add R0-R4 rollout gate automation and evidence aggregation (42 tests)

RolloutGate model with R0-R4 stage evaluation: R0 (baseline hardening),
R1 (shadow validation), R2 (canary cutover with soak metrics),
R3 (progressive rollout with workspace compliance), R4 (promotion).
GateEvidencePackage JSON output for go/no-go review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
